title: Graph export error
excerpt:
Hello to all. 
Any graphic I create, once exported in CSV format, gives me an error when opening. 
This is what appears when using the “Preview” feature on my Mac. 
Can anyone tell me how to solve this annoying problem?

posts.author: AleRun (Alessandro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello to all.
Any graphic I create, once exported in CSV format, gives me an error when opening.

This is what appears when using the “Preview” feature on my Mac.

Can anyone tell me how to solve this annoying problem?
